materials.title: Algebra Basics Revision Notes
materials.description: Foundational revision notes covering variables, expressions, and simple equation manipulation. Best for refreshing core algebraic identities before moving to harder problems.

materials.title: Algebra Problem Set - Factorization & Identities
materials.description: Practice problems on factorization, algebraic identities like (a+b)^2, and rearranging expressions. Includes worked solutions.

materials.title: Quadratic Equations Concept Video
materials.description: Video explainer covering the quadratic formula, discriminant, and graphical interpretation of roots.

materials.title: Solving Quadratics by Factoring - Worked Examples
materials.description: Step-by-step worked examples on solving quadratics by factoring, completing the square, and using the quadratic formula.

materials.title: Ray Diagrams Explained
materials.description: Visual walkthrough of ray diagrams for concave and convex mirrors and lenses. Covers sign conventions and image formation rules.

materials.title: Mirror and Lens Formula Practice
materials.description: Practice problems applying the mirror formula and lens formula, with magnification calculations and sign convention drills.

materials.title: Linear Equations in Two Variables - Quick Review
materials.description: Quick refresher on graphing linear equations, substitution, and elimination methods for simultaneous equations.

materials.title: Balancing Chemical Equations Drill
materials.description: Drill of balancing chemical equations across common reaction types: combination, decomposition, displacement, redox.

materials.title: Ohm's Law and Circuit Basics
materials.description: Introduction to Ohm's law, series and parallel circuits, and basic power calculations.

materials.title: Algebra Speed Round - Timed Mock
materials.description: Timed mock paper with mixed algebra problems under exam conditions. Targets speed and accuracy for test prep.

materials.title: Word Problems Using Quadratic Equations
materials.description: Applied word problems translating real-world scenarios into quadratic equations: area, speed-distance, number relations.

materials.title: Refractive Index and Snell's Law - Concept Notes
materials.description: Conceptual notes on refractive index, Snell's law, and total internal reflection with day-to-day examples.
